title: Media Delivery, Range Requests, MP4, HLS, and Streaming Boundaries · Runtime Contract: Mp4 Progressive Download
summary: A video player downloads whole large files for seeking, an origin emits invalid range responses, MP4 metadata sits at the end, and private segment access differs from manifest access. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mp4 progressive download increment in accessible media-delivery and range plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Prepare correct media type, length, validators, byte ranges, and fast-start MP4 metadata for progressive download and seeking.
Meet ascending, nonoverlapping, valid Range behavior, understand larger origin fetches, 200 fallbacks, chunked-origin limits, and cache chunking.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Mp4 Progressive Download · Theory Mp4 Progressive Download
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 4828 during a high-traffic evidence intake window. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate CloudFront range shape, progressive media layout, and accessible playback; retain stable tenant and file identity without exposing it in metric labels; then cancel halfway through and prove every body, part, and goroutine reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
